scripts.prerelease: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.release:patch: pnpm run prerelease && pnpm -r exec -- npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && git add -A && git commit -m "v$(node -p "require('./packages/core/package.json').version")" && git tag "v$(node -p "require('./packages/core/package.json').version")" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run prerelease && pnpm -r exec -- npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && git add -A && git commit -m "v$(node -p "require('./packages/core/package.json').version")" && git tag "v$(node -p "require('./packages/core/package.json').version")" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm run prerelease && pnpm -r exec -- npm version major --no-git-tag-version && git add -A && git commit -m "v$(node -p "require('./packages/core/package.json').version")" && git tag "v$(node -p "require('./packages/core/package.json').version")" && git push --follow-tags
